full_text:
Bing Zhi (Xuansi) 邴祉 (宣嗣)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bing Zhi (邴祉), styledXuansi (宣嗣), was born in Danyang. An Administrator under Sun Jian who died in the early 190s. Bing Zhi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and Yuan Shu. Bing Zhi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
